mapper.select: SELECT id, gym_id, available_weekday_start, available_weekday_end, available_weekend_start, available_weekend_end FROM GYM_SCHEDULE WHERE gym_id = #{value}

SELECT ps.id AS id, ps.trainer_id AS trainerId, t_user.name AS trainerName, m_user.name AS clientName, DATE_FORMAT(ps.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, HOUR(ps.start_time) AS startHour, WEEKDAY(ps.lesson_date) + 1 AS dayOfWeek, ps.status AS status FROM LESSON ps JOIN TRAINER t ON ps.trainer_id = t.id JOIN `USER` t_user ON t.user_id = t_user.id JOIN MEMBER m ON ps.client_id = m.id JOIN `USER` m_user ON m.user_id = m_user.id WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND ps.lesson_date >= #{weekStart} AND ps.lesson_date < #{weekEnd} AND ps.status != '취소' ORDER BY ps.lesson_date, ps.start_time
SELECT t.id AS trainerId, u.name AS trainerName FROM TRAINER t JOIN `USER` u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.gym_id = #{value} AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY u.name
